components.name: circle
components.description: Filled circle centred on pos. Alias 'hole' is also accepted.

variables.name: r
variables.description: Radius in mm.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. rz rotates any attached transform; the circle itself is symmetric.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="26.0000mm" height="26.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 26.0000 26.0000">
  <circle cx="13.0000" cy="13.0000" r="8.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: circle_slice
components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="10.0000mm" height="10.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 10.0000 10.0000">
  <path d="M 10.0 0.0 A 10 10 0 0 1 6.123233995736766e-16 10.0 L 0 0 Z" transform="translate(5.0000 5.0000)"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: dimension_line
components.description: Engineering dimension annotation: extension lines, a dimension bar with end ticks, and a centred label.  Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with configurable offset and tick style.

variables.name: p1
variables.description: First measurement point [x, y] relative to pos.

variables.name: p2
variables.description: Second measurement point [x, y] relative to pos.

variables.name: direction
variables.description: 'horizontal' — dim line runs horizontally, extension lines are vertical.  'vertical' — dim line runs vertically, extension lines are horizontal.  'auto' (default) — inferred from the larger axis span of p1→p2.

variables.name: offset
variables.description: Signed perpendicular distance from the measured edge to the dimension bar (mm).  Positive = above for horizontal, right for vertical.

variables.name: text
variables.description: Label string.  Omit (or pass '') to auto-compute the distance.

variables.name: text_size
variables.description: Label font size in mm.

variables.name: font
variables.description: Label font family.

variables.name: gap
variables.description: Gap between the measured object edge and the start of each extension line (mm).

variables.name: overshoot
variables.description: How far the extension line continues past the dimension bar (mm).

variables.name: tick_size
variables.description: Half-length of the tick marks at each end of the dimension bar (mm).

variables.name: text_offset
variables.description: Additional gap between the dimension bar and the text label (mm).  Positive places text on the far side of the bar from the object.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Stroke width for all lines (mm).

variables.name: color
variables.description: Color applied to lines and text.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Component anchor [x, y, z] in mm (Y-up).

components.name: line
components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="10.0000mm" height="10.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 10.0000 10.0000">
  <line x1="5.0000" y1="5.0000" x2="15.0000" y2="-5.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="1" />
</svg>

components.name: oobb_circle
components.description: Solid disc sized to the OOBB grid. diameter is in OOBB units (osp=15 mm), so diameter=3 → 45 mm outer diameter.

variables.name: diameter
variables.description: Disc diameter in OOBB units. Rendered radius = diameter × osp / 2.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. rz rotates any attached transform; the disc itself is symmetric.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="55.0000mm" height="55.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 55.0000 55.0000">
  <circle cx="27.5000" cy="27.5000" r="22.5000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: oobb_holes
components.description: Grid of circles at every OOBB hole position for a width×height plate. radius_name selects the fastener size (e.g. 'm6', 'm3').

variables.name: width
variables.description: Grid width in OOBB units (number of hole columns).

variables.name: height
variables.description: Grid height in OOBB units (number of hole rows).

variables.name: radius_name
variables.description: Fastener size key, e.g. 'm6', 'm3', 'm4'. Resolved via opsvg._gv('hole_radius_<name>').

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up). Must match the pos of the companion oobb_plate.

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Only rz affects the 2-D render.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour for each hole circle (CSS colour string). Set to 'none' for outline-only holes.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw outlines; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.name: oobb_plate
components.description: OOBB grid plate: a rounded rectangle whose dimensions are computed from width/height in OOBB units (osp=15 mm, osp_minus=1 mm). A 2×1 plate is 29×14 mm.

variables.name: width
variables.description: Plate width in OOBB units.

variables.name: height
variables.description: Plate height in OOBB units.

variables.name: corner_radius
variables.description: Corner radius in mm.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Only rz affects the 2-D render.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="39.0000mm" height="39.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 39.0000 39.0000">
  <rect x="5.0000" y="5.0000" width="29.0000" height="29.0000" rx="2.0000" ry="2.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: polygon
components.description: Arbitrary filled polygon. Points are relative to pos, so repositioning is done by changing pos alone.

variables.name: points
variables.description: List of [x, y] vertices in mm, relative to pos. The polygon is automatically closed.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Origin offset [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up). All points are translated by this value.

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Only rz affects the 2-D render.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="30.0000mm" height="28.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 30.0000 28.0000">
  <polygon points="15.0000,5.0000 5.0000,23.0000 25.0000,23.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: rect
components.description: Axis-aligned filled rectangle, centred on pos.

variables.name: size
variables.description: Width, height and depth in mm as [w, h, d]. Depth is carried through but ignored by the 2-D renderer.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] in degrees. Only rz (Z-axis) affects the 2-D render.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="40.0000mm" height="30.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 40.0000 30.0000">
  <rect x="5.0000" y="5.0000" width="30.0000" height="20.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: rounded_rectangle
components.description: Axis-aligned rectangle with uniform corner radii, centred on pos. Accepts aliases 'rounded_rect' and 'rrect'.

variables.name: size
variables.description: Width, height, depth in mm as [w, h, d]. Depth is carried through but ignored by the 2-D renderer.

variables.name: r
variables.description: Corner radius in mm.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Only rz affects the 2-D render.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="40.0000mm" height="30.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 40.0000 30.0000">
  <rect x="5.0000" y="5.0000" width="30.0000" height="20.0000" rx="4.0000" ry="4.0000"  fill="#333333" stroke="none" />
</svg>

components.name: slot
components.description: Capsule shape: two semicircles joined by a rectangle. Horizontal by default; use rot=[0,0,90] for a vertical slot.

variables.name: r
variables.description: End-cap radius in mm (also controls slot width = 2r).

variables.name: w
variables.description: Centre-to-centre travel distance in mm (total length = w + 2r).

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Centre position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Use rz=90 for vertical.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string, e.g. '#333333'). Set to 'none' for an outline-only shape.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw an outline; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

components.name: text
components.description: SVG text element positioned at pos. Supports horizontal/vertical alignment, font family, and size. Use the color kwarg to override the default fill colour.

variables.name: text
variables.description: The string to render.

variables.name: size
variables.description: Font size in mm.

variables.name: font
variables.description: Font family name. A ':style=Bold' suffix is stripped to keep the SVG font-family clean.

variables.name: halign
variables.description: Horizontal alignment: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

variables.name: valign
variables.description: Vertical alignment: 'bottom', 'center', or 'top'.

variables.name: color
variables.description: Fill colour (CSS colour string). Use 'none' for invisible fill (stroke-only text). Defaults to the global fill colour when empty.

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Outline colour for the text glyphs (CSS colour string). Set to a colour to draw outlined/hollow text; 'none' disables it.

variables.name: stroke_width
variables.description: Glyph outline width in mm. Only visible when stroke is set.

variables.name: pos
variables.description: Anchor position [x, y, z] in OOBB mm (Y-up).

variables.name: rot
variables.description: Rotation [rx, ry, rz] degrees. Only rz affects the 2-D render.

components.sample_svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="10.0000mm" height="10.0000mm"
     viewBox="0 0 10.0000 10.0000">
  <text x="5.0000" y="5.0000" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10.0000" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" fill="#333333">Sample</text>
</svg>

style_options.name: stylesheet
style_options.description: Selects a named stylesheet for the whole part. A single name applies one sheet; a list merges multiple sheets left to right.

style_options.name: styles
style_options.description: Overrides named styles such as plate or header.label for this part only. These overrides are merged on top of the resolved stylesheet.

style_options.name: stylesheet
style_options.description: Selects a named stylesheet for the whole part. A single name applies one sheet; a list merges multiple sheets left to right.

style_options.name: styles
style_options.description: Overrides named styles such as plate or header.label for this part only. These overrides are merged on top of the resolved stylesheet.

stylesheets.name: default
stylesheets.label: Default
stylesheets.description: Technical monochrome palette. Dark charcoal fills, single burnt-orange (#E85D04) accent. Clean, precise — designed for laser-cut technical drawings and assembly labels.

stylesheets.name: jazzy
stylesheets.label: Jazzy
stylesheets.description: Vivid purple-and-coral palette. Deep navy plates (#1B2869), fuchsia headers (#7B2FBE), coral accents (#FF6B6B), gold holes (#FFD60A) and sky-blue slots (#00B4D8). Bold and expressive — great for demos, art pieces, and anything that should pop.

stylesheets.name: blueprint
stylesheets.label: Blueprint
stylesheets.description: Engineering blueprint aesthetic. Deep navy background with technical cyan detailing and gold dimension-line accents. Evokes CAD schematics and technical drawings — clear, precise, professional.

stylesheets.name: high_contrast
stylesheets.label: High Contrast
stylesheets.description: Maximum contrast black and white palette. Bold fills, thick outlines, and white text on black. Ideal for accessibility requirements, photocopying, vinyl cutting, or single-colour laser engraving.

stylesheets.name: minimal
stylesheets.label: Minimal
stylesheets.description: Ultra-clean outline style. Near-white fills, hairline borders, and small grey labels. Inspired by architectural drawings and wireframe mockups — invisible until you look closely, precise when you do.

stylesheets.name: neon
stylesheets.label: Neon
stylesheets.description: Dark synthwave palette. Near-black background with vivid neon fills — electric green, hot magenta, cyan. High energy and expressive — great for demos, visualisations, and anything that needs to glow.

stylesheets.name: pastel
stylesheets.label: Pastel
stylesheets.description: Soft pastel palette. Blush pinks, mints, periwinkles, and creams with warm rose accents. Gentle and approachable — ideal for educational materials, decorative labels, or anywhere a friendly tone is needed.

stylesheets.name: project_bolt
stylesheets.label: Project Bolt
stylesheets.description: Clean utilitarian hardware-bin card style. Crisp white body, near-black double border, bold sans-serif title, light-grey ruled lines, and a strong dark "Contents" header cell in the bottom table. Inspired by the physical Project Bolt tin label cards.
